resources.string: Are you sure you want to delete these photos?
How the app manages your photos and generally behaves
How the app gathers & displays statistics
Backup/restore app data, like statistics & swiped items
If disabled, your phone\'s trash will be used, typically deleting the photo
Use your system\'s default font, instead of PhotoSwooper\'s chosen font
Use colours, typically chosen from your wallpaper, in PhotoSwooper
Reduce the use of animations in PhotoSwooper, such as photos zooming in and bouncing when entering the screen
When enabled, the app will immediately delete photos, rather than first navigating to the review screen
Pause background media while a video is playing
When enabled, audio playing in the background will pause while a video is playing in PhotoSwooper
This preference requires statistics to be enabled
If disabled, the start of the week is displayed as sunday

Hi, I'm Loowiz!

 Making and maintaining PhotoSwooper takes a lot of time and effort, and, although I do very much enjoy it, A donation would be super appreciated :)

It shows me that people love and appreciate the work I do, and helps me out financially too - a struggle, being a student heh. 

If you do choose to donate, Ko-fi is the easiest - providing one-time donations and a fun UI. Then there's LiberaPay - open source, but recurring donations only.

If not, no worries, I just hope you enjoy the app!
Are you sure you want to start the tutorial again?
To apply this preference PhotoSwooper must be restarted
Warning: This will unswipe items currently marked as deleted
Automatically replay videos when they reach the end
Rewind a configured number of seconds
Fast forward by a configured number of seconds
Show info about the current photo
Share the current photo or video
Please grant PhotoSwooper access to your photos & videos
Photos you swipe on will show up here
Thanks for downloading PhotoSwooper! Please check below for any settings you may want to change
These settings can be changed later on
Items are marked as keep when you swipe right on them.
Items are marked as delete when you swipe left on them.

This contains an: 
- undo button (undo previous swipe)
- review button (review and delete marked photos)
- filter button (filter what media is shown)
Try to undo all the swipes you just performed!
The filter button lets you choose what you swipe on & set the order they are displayed
Try filtering for only photos, and have them be displayed in order of most recent first!
Here you can see all the items you have swiped on (only shows deleted by default)\nTo delete the items marked as such, you would click the bottom right delete button
Try unswiping one photo/video by tapping and holding one to select it, then tapping \'Unswipe\'
The statistics screen displays statistics about your swiping history
Try to see how much space you have saved in the past day
Here you can customise your experience in the app
Thanks for completing the tutorial, I hope you enjoy PhotoSwooper :D
No photos to be deleted found
Collect statistics about when and how much you swipe for you to look back on. This never leaves your device
Warning: Disabling statistics also disables any custom photo retention periods
You may report this crash online via codeberg, or by email:
